title: TriShot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Trishot.jpg|thumb|TriShot]]
The '''TriShot''' was a weapon that could be considered the [[Pistol/Legends|pistol]] form of a [[Shotgun/Legends|shotgun]]. The TriShot fired three [[Laser/Legends|laser]] bolts at once and did moderate damage, but if used too much too quickly, it would overheat. Some models of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droid]] had TriShots as their secondary weapon. Later, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the TriShot was modified into holdout [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] form, and may have been used by [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]].

Other than its similarities, it is unknown how else it is related to a [[Triple blaster/Legends|Triple blaster]].

{{Tech-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
It should be noted that the [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droid]] has never been seen utilizing the TriShot weapon except in its appearance in ''Star Wars: Battlefront'' and its sequel; as such, this weapon is likely to be simple game mechanics.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]''
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''
